_meta.purpose: Manual overrides for the rules-based card classifier. Each entry replaces the auto-classification entirely.
_meta.schema: Map of canonical Scryfall card name -> { categories: CardCategory[], note?: string }
policy: Add an entry only when the regex misfires and a fix in rules.ts would over-tag other cards.
If the regex itself is too narrow / too broad, prefer fixing rules.ts and writing a test instead.
Keep the note short: one sentence explaining why the override is needed.

Smothering Tithe.note: Treasure tokens are ramp; replacement effect on opponent draws makes it pseudo-draw via tax pressure. Brief calls this out as the canonical ambiguous case.

Dockside Extortionist.note: Treasure tokens; banned in some pods but still classifiable.

Rhystic Study.note: Repeatable card draw scaling with pod size.

Approach of the Second Sun.note: Alt-win text but the regex misses it (text says 'win the game' inside a conditional).

Thassa's Oracle.note: Combo wincon piece; flagged for analytics even though our auto-rule doesn't match the conditional.

Demonic Tutor.note: Canonical broad tutor; ensure regex change never demotes it.

Mystical Tutor.note: Narrow tutor (instants/sorceries) — still tutor for our purposes.

Cyclonic Rift.note: Targeted removal at 2 mana; one-sided wipe at overload.

Toxic Deluge.note: X-based -X/-X wipe; the parametric -X form may not match the literal -N pattern.

Chord of Calling.note: Convoke creature tutor that puts it onto the battlefield directly.

Sol Ring.note: Mana rock — sanity-anchored override so future regex tweaks don't accidentally demote it.
